creator: rew@FreeBSD.org
text:
If autofs fails to mount a request, /net/share in you case, it will retry two more times - autofs will also delay one second in between retries. This is likely the cause of the slow down.

Could you try setting the following sysctl and see if the slow down still occurs?

    # sysctl vfs.autofs.retry_attempts=0

To avoid spamming syslog, you can dial back autofs log messages:

    # sysctl vfs.autofs.debug=0
